Total Electric Delivery Charges - Total Pennylvania Clean Energy Electric Generation Charges = $85.71

Total Electric Delivery Charges / (Total Electric Delivery Charges - Total Pennylvania Clean Energy Electric Generation Charges) = 4.04

The cost per kWh of electricity delivery is calculated as follows:

Delivery cost per kWh = Total Electric Delivery Charges / Total Electric Delivery Charges (in kWh)

Total Electric Delivery Charges = $112.31

Total Electric Delivery Charges / Total Electric Delivery Charges = 1

Rounding to 2 significant figures, we get 1 EUR/kWh ###
